sentences.english: I consider myself a pretty lucky person, because good things seem to happen to me randomly.
sentences.korean: 꽤 운이 좋은 사람이라고 생각해요. 좋은 일이 무작위로 생기는 것 같아서요.

sentences.english: I don't believe in luck, I think everything is the result of hard work.
sentences.korean: 운을 믿지 않아요. 모든 것은 노력의 결과라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: I won a raffle once and got a free trip to Bali, so yeah, I believe in luck.
sentences.korean: 한번 추첨에 당첨되어 발리 무료 여행을 받았어요. 그래서 네, 운을 믿어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
